reason: Verified that agent successfully uses GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username after granting required permissions.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents list.
Clicked on "QA-20260421-194304-c155" agent in sidebar — Agent detail view opened, showing agent status as "idle".
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle", meeting the requirement.
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message sent successfully, agent transitioned to "working" state.
GitHub account access request card appeared — Card showed "Account Access Request" asking to allow GitHub access, with pre-connected GitHub account checkbox already selected.
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub access — GitHub access granted, agent transitioned back to "working" state.
GitHub API request review card appeared — Card showed "API Request Review" asking to approve GET /user endpoint call to GitHub.
Clicked "Allow" button for API request and selected "Allow Once" — API request approved, agent continued processing.
Waited for agent response (total wait time: 34 seconds, within 4-minute limit) — Agent completed work and returned response.
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displayed "Your GitHub username is yiw190." confirming successful GitHub lookup.
Took final screenshot — Screenshot captured showing complete conversation flow with GitHub username result.
